programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: It's fireworks at our farmer's first get-together as one of the Famer's speed-date ladies comes back for a second chance at love, and an anonymous message threatens to tear one farm apart.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: As Guthrie takes on a new position as the hospital chaplain, he considers having a risky surgery to treat his Parkinson’s. Also, the doctors treat patients who arrive at Angels from an apartment fire.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: After pulling a double shift, Mario risks his own life when he follows Willis to a construction site where two brothers are trapped on a crane 300 feet above the ground.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: The young girl Ariel bonded with a year ago when she lost her father, returns to Angels.

programme.title: My Reno Rules
programme.desc: After their first round of feedback and with more rooms this week to transform, the rival renovators are out to prove their worth. Ambitious plans push teams to the limit, while tempers flare.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: A Kiss Is Just A Kiss
programme.desc: Darlene continues to struggle with deciding between David and Ben. Becky begins to doubt herself as a mom, and Mark gets in trouble at school when a picture of him and his boyfriend kissing goes viral. Meanwhile, Jackie continues to avoid her problems by keeping busy with everyone else's.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Harris is forced to confront Darlene about her lifestyle, while Jackie involves herself in other people's problems to avoid confronting her own. Meanwhile, Becky is overwhelmed by the costs of raising a baby, so her family steps in to help.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.sub-title: Can This Cheetah Pass The Test?
programme.desc: A rescue kitten is struggling to walk since being microchipped and her family is worried it may have caused spinal damage. Will surgery restore Mitzi's ability to walk?

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Your Deceased Mother Would Be Ashamed of You!/Clueless Tenant?!
programme.desc: An elderly woman attempts to collect money from the family of a deceased friend for a cruise they had planned to go on; a man is asked to leave his home by his landlord, but he tells the Judge he thinks his landlord is breaking the law.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Following an reported repossession, the vehicle was exchanged between the buyer and seller multiple times before a final payment settled the deal.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Stella discovers that her old friend, Professor Papakota, may be connected to the Greek antiquities smuggling ring and travels to Greece to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the killing of a man afflicted with Hypertrichosis, a.k.a. human werewolf syndrome.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Three gunrunners are killed by a new high-tech weapon called The Vaporiser. After Horatio interviews the CEO of the defence contractor that made the weapon, he also turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: A group of violent kidnappers capture Robert Dunbrook's son just before he is scheduled to testify against his father to a grand jury, and the CSI team is rocked by a tragedy.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: An ad man's body is found in community centre playground. The victim had burned his bridges by adopting an aggressive attitude and was a member of a radical honesty supporting group.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: When an anti-capitalist protestor is murdered, Jane and the team investigate and find themselves caught in a war between eco-activists and a tech billionaire fighting over a piece of land. Also, Jane and Captain Joe (Enver Gjokaj) go on a date.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates a cold case involving WWII-era bones on the 80th anniversary of the Pearl Harbour bombings, and are shocked to learn they belong to a 100-year-old survivor of the attack.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide To Divorce
programme.desc: Abby hosts a party for the baseball team’s parents while trying to keep her relationship with Mike quiet. Barbara gets more than a new stovetop when she meets contractor Darrell to remodel her kitchen.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Denise tries to help Tanya move on with life after Jeremy. Roxy is close to opening the truck stop for business. Claudia Joy has a hard time adjusting to how she and Michael are being treated on post.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: The tribe prepares to leave Fort Marshall and go their separate ways. Roxy has a hard time adjusting to the idea of moving. Amid the base closing, Joan is busy getting the fort ready for an incoming hurricane.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the hurricane, one Army wife fights for her life, another searches for a place to live after her apartment building is destroyed and Joan gets overwhelmed trying to manage the after-effects of the storm.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: Lindsay explores why singing sounds better in the shower, while Thomas shares tips and tricks.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: Serena creates a balloon “paranormal” friend, while Thomas and Jacqui face off in an ultimate nerve challenge.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: The Great Day Out is people, places and friendly faces; it is at the very heart of Queensland and special guest celebrities will invite you along on their Great Day Out.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: It's a day of dates, farm work and farewells for our ladies as they explore whether rural life is for them. Some face the prospect of leaving but one departure changes everything.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: The doctors work with the Center for Disease Control and Prevention to find an antidote to the deadly viral outbreak at Angels Memorial. Also, Leanne makes a life-changing decision, and Jesse welcomes a new batch of residents.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: A drug bust-turned-shootout tests the bravery of the doctors of Angels Memorial as they race to save a girl caught in the crossfire. Also, Willis shifts his focus to field medicine, choosing to work primarily on an ambulance with his new partner, paramedic Rox. And Leanne begins her journey to adopt Ariel.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: A patient who is a self-proclaimed psychic envisions the doctors and nurses singing and dancing, seeing beauty amid the chaos at Angels Memorial.

programme.title: The Greatest Aussie Caravan
programme.desc: Each week, four husband and wife teams will test their skills as they go head-to-head to see who has what it takes to design, refurbish and re-build The Greatest Aussie Caravan.

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Bow convinces Dre to attend a fundraising event to make some new friends but Dre is convinced there will be nothing. Their expectations are far exceeded when they see the special guest.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam calls Brea, despite promising to keep distant so they can each establish themselves at college, sending Beverly into a tailspin.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Desperate for more income, Becky seeks a bartending position at Casita Bonita, causing major concern for Dan due to her struggle with alcoholism. Meanwhile, Darlene finally nears a decision between David and Ben; and Harris' new friend, Odessa, means new trouble.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Halloween brings nothing but horror for Jackie after she uncovers a shocking secret when trying to reopen the Lunch Box; Mary gets upset when a woman assumes she is adopted; Darlene continues to deal with her complicated love life.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.sub-title: Update On Poppy, The Dog Without A Nose
programme.desc: Chris is answering a call for help from May Dodd, who runs an animal shelter for abandoned donkeys. One of her residents, Dusty, has developed a very strange walk. Can Chris save Dusty?

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Grieving Sisters Try to Keep It Friendly!/Vanishing Carpenter?!
programme.desc: Sisters have a dispute over their late mother's car in Judge Judy's court; a man wants a carpenter to return to his home and make repairs to a leaky door, but the latter claims the alleged damages are the fault of the client.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Nine Phones, One Deadbeat Ex-Lover?!/Unlicensed Teen Coming in Hot!/Help Me and My Five Kids?
programme.desc: A man who cheated on his lover says only four of his phones contributed to her bill; a 17-year-old broadsides a motorist then flees the scene; a woman has a strange way of showing gratitude after a stranger gives her a place to stay.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: When Cuddy's mother is admitted to the hospital, she won't let House treat her, but his team discovers secrets she kept from Cuddy and her sister.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: When a waitress with a perfect memory suffers temporary paralysis, her older sister visits her in the hospital, which triggers high stress levels and even more health complications.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: After House traumatizes a fifth-grade class with explicit medical stories during Career Day, he's sent to the principal's office and two students offer him relationship advice.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: When a navy lieutenant becomes the victim of fatal radiation poisoning, the NCIS team set out to find the person behind it.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Sam goes undercover as an MMA fighter after a Marine bleeds to death outside a club. It does not take him long to find out that he is not the only undercover officer in the gym.

programme.title: Wicked City
programme.desc: Detectives Jack Roth and new partner Paco Contreras are assigned to track down a killer who preys on women seeking fame in1980s Los Angeles.

programme.title: Wicked City
programme.desc: Jack and Paco get a lead on the serial killer's next possible victim and race against the clock to try and track her down before the killer gets to her.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: Harker learns Gen. Shaw isn't the hero he pretends to be; Van Helsing's first test with the solar serum is a failure; Davenport's people abduct Renfield.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: Browning sets out to prove once and for all that Grayson is the master vampire stalking London by hosting a board meeting outdoors in the sunlight. Grayson and Van Helsing seek to acquire the final component to make their wireless electricity technology a success to be witnessed. Meanwhile, Mina and Harker consummate their love - not knowing that Lord Davenport plots to destroy the object that Grayson loves most...Mina.

programme.title: Day Break
programme.sub-title: What If He Lets Her Go
programme.desc: Hopper learns someone close to him may have been involved in framing him for Garza's murder.

programme.title: Dream Academy
programme.desc: A rare insight into the highs and lows of life as a start-up entrepreneur. This documentary series follows a group of fledgling businesses as they strive to make their first million.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: Sebastian builds a powerful machine, while Jacqui discovers how strong a balloon can be.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: The team heads to New Zealand’s South Island to brave the elements and try bungee jumping.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: The Great Day Out is people, places and friendly faces; it is at the very heart of Queensland and special guest celebrities will invite you along on their Great Day Out.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: Some new additions, picked out by the farmers mums, lead to new romantic connections and shock departures. Farmer Dean makes a decision about his future.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: Jesse is in denial when his brother arrives at Angels Memorial in bad shape after being pinned down in a warehouse collapse, and further tests reveal he has advanced congestive heart failure. Also, Willis opens up to Rox about his brother who was killed in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: Willis and Rox arrive at a road rage accident resulting in multiple serious injuries. Also, Elliot doubts his ability as a doctor when he’s sued for his role in the death of the SWAT officer involved in the drug bust-turned-shootout, and Leanne discovers Ariel on an ice cream “date” with Max, a young patient at the hospital.
